name_cn:
ꫛꫀꪝ
A new member of the puzzle pebbled leather family. Ah, the color of spring. Minimalist and atmospheric geometric design, sweet yet salty. Custom pebbled calfskin, comfortable to the touch, instantly elevates your look. 3D bag shape with extraordinary capacity. A popular item you can never have enough of. Size: 24*10*14cm
